definitions.text: An arthropod (in the Insecta class) characterized by six legs, up to four wings, and a chitinous exoskeleton.
examples: Our shed has several insect infestations, including ants, yellowjackets, and wasps.

definitions.text: Any small, creeping, crawling, or slithering animal, excluding mammals, birds, and fish. An arthropod or invertebrate.
